key.name: show-root-account
key.summary: Whether to show Rooted users in the Control Center Accounts plugin
key.description: Whether to show Rooted users in the Control Center Accounts plugin.

key.name: server-mode
key.description: Whether the Control Center is running in server mode.

key.name: show-password-expiration-policy
key.description: Whether to show the Password Expiration Policy in the Control Center Accounts plugin.
